title: T-085 — dept_column_drafts partial unique (org_id, dept_id, column_key) WHERE status='draft' (FT-025)
prompt:
# T-085 — dept_column_drafts partial unique (org_id, dept_id, column_key) WHERE status='draft' (FT-025)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §6
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-025** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
Add partial unique index restricted to status='draft' rows.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 033 CREATE UNIQUE INDEX dept_column_drafts_active_draft_uq ON dept_column_drafts (org_id, dept_id, column_key) WHERE status = 'draft'.
2. Test inserts two drafts with same triple → second raises SQLSTATE 23505.
3. Test inserts one draft + one approved with same triple → both succeed.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/033-dept-column-drafts-unique.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/dept-column-drafts-unique.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 033 applied, when two drafts with the same (org_id, dept_id, column_key) are inserted, then the second raises SQLSTATE 23505.
2. Given one draft and one approved (or rejected) with the same triple, when inserted, then both succeed.

## Test strategy
- RED: write dept-column-drafts-unique.test.ts before migration.
- Pin SQLSTATE 23505.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate && pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test dept-column-drafts-unique`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not make the index non-partial (would break post-draft rows).
- Do not change column_key uniqueness semantics elsewhere.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add partial unique index on dept_column_drafts (org_id, dept_id, column_key) WHERE status='draft' to prevent duplicate drafts.
pipeline_inputs.details: T-036 left dept_column_drafts open to duplicate (org_id, dept_id, column_key) draft rows. Add the partial unique to enforce at most one active draft per key.
out_of_scope: Do not refactor dept_column_drafts schema beyond the index.

Given one draft and one approved (or rejected) with the same triple, when inserted, then both succeed.
